analysis.summary_en: Risk-on day for Taiwan with TAIEX +1.49%, but the story is MediaTek (2454) limit-up +9.81% and Hon Hai (2317) +4.74% leading, while TSMC sits flat at 2050 despite its ADR ripping +5.28% overnight. This sets up a significant ADR-local gap that typically closes on the next session. Semiconductor breadth is constructive (UMC +3.15%), while backend/testing (ASE 3711 -1.48%) and Largan (3008 -2.27%) lag.
analysis.summary_zh: 台股今日風險偏好轉強,加權指數上漲1.49%,但真正亮點是聯發科(2454)漲停+9.81%與鴻海(2317)+4.74%領漲,而台積電(2330)則在2050元平盤,儘管其ADR昨夜大漲+5.28%。此情況形成顯著的ADR與現股價差,通常會在下一交易日收斂。半導體廣度表現良好(聯電+3.15%),但後段封測(日月光 -1.48%)與大立光(-2.27%)落後。

key_stories.headline_en: MediaTek limit-up +9.81% on heavy volume leads Taiwan tech rally
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯發科漲停+9.81%爆量領漲台股科技類股
key_stories.analysis_en: MediaTek hit the 10% daily limit on 23M shares — this is a structural move, not noise. Likely catalysts: AI ASIC/custom silicon win speculation (Google TPU partnership rumors have been recurring), Dimensity flagship design-in momentum, or sympathy with NVIDIA/AI semi strength. Given TSMC local didn't follow its ADR, capital may be rotating INTO MediaTek specifically rather than broad semis. Watch for follow-through tomorrow; limit-up days in Taiwan large caps often see gap-up continuation or sharp profit-taking depending on foreign flow data post-close.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 聯發科以2,300萬股量能觸及10%漲停——屬結構性走勢而非雜訊。可能催化劑:AI ASIC/客製晶片訂單預期(Google TPU合作傳聞持續)、天璣旗艦設計案動能,或與NVIDIA/AI半導體強勢的同步效應。由於台積電現股未跟隨ADR,資金可能特別輪動至聯發科而非全面性買進半導體。明日需觀察後續表現;台股大型股漲停後常見跳空續漲或獲利了結,取決於收盤後外資買賣超數據。

key_stories.headline_en: Hon Hai +4.74% on 135M volume — AI server / Apple supplier chain flow
key_stories.headline_zh: 鴻海+4.74%成交1.36億股——AI伺服器/蘋果供應鏈資金流入
key_stories.analysis_en: 135M shares is a huge tape for Hon Hai. Move is consistent with AI server rack (GB200/GB300) shipment momentum narrative plus general risk-on. No specific catalyst in today's news feed, so treat as tape-driven momentum rather than fundamental news. Falsifier: if tomorrow's foreign institutional data shows net SELL in 2317, this was short-covering / retail chase, not smart money.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 鴻海1.36億股成交量極為龐大。走勢符合AI伺服器機櫃(GB200/GB300)出貨動能敘事與整體風險偏好。今日新聞無特定催化劑,應視為盤面動能驅動而非基本面消息。反證條件:若明日外資買賣超顯示賣超2317,則此波為軋空/散戶追價,非聰明錢。

key_stories.headline_en: TSMC local flat while TSM ADR +5.28% — sizable catch-up setup
key_stories.headline_zh: 台積電現股平盤而TSM ADR上漲5.28%——顯著補漲缺口
key_stories.analysis_en: TSMC local closed 2050 unchanged despite its ADR jumping +5.28% overnight. Taiwan session may have closed BEFORE the US move (timestamps suggest this), meaning the catch-up typically happens next open. A 5.28% ADR gap is unusually large and usually mean-reverts ~50-70% at next Taiwan open, absent negative overnight news. Falsifier: overnight SPX/SOX reversal, geopolitical headline, or TSMC-specific negative news (e.g., Arizona capex issue, China export control).
key_stories.analysis_zh: 台積電現股收2050平盤,但ADR夜盤大漲5.28%。台股盤可能在美股波動前已收盤(時間戳顯示如此),補漲通常發生在次日開盤。5.28%的ADR溢價異常巨大,若無隔夜負面消息,通常會在次日台股開盤回補50-70%。反證條件:隔夜標普/費半反轉、地緣政治新聞、或台積電特定利空(如亞利桑那廠資本支出問題、中國出口管制)。

key_stories.headline_en: ASE Tech (3711) -1.48% diverges from ADR +1.18% — backend weakness
key_stories.headline_zh: 日月光投控(3711)-1.48%與ADR +1.18%背離——後段封測疲弱
key_stories.analysis_en: ASE local down 1.48% while ASX ADR was up 1.18% — 2.66% divergence the WRONG way. Combined with Largan (3008) -2.27%, this suggests rotation OUT of backend/optical into foundry/AI names (TSMC ADR, MediaTek, UMC, Hon Hai). Not a crisis signal, but note the breadth narrowness: AI/foundry bid, non-AI semis offered.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 日月光現股下跌1.48%而ASX ADR上漲1.18%——2.66%反向背離。結合大立光(3008)-2.27%,顯示資金從後段封測/光學輪出至晶圓代工/AI族群(台積電ADR、聯發科、聯電、鴻海)。非危機訊號,但需留意廣度狹窄:AI/晶圓代工受青睞,非AI半導體遭賣壓。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Very large gap. TSM ADR +5.28% vs TSMC local flat. High-probability catch-up on next Taiwan open if no adverse overnight headlines. Historical base rate: gaps this size typically close 50-70% at open, full close within 1-2 sessions. Monitor US futures and any Trump/China tariff headlines before Taiwan open.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 極大價差。TSM ADR +5.28%,台積電現股平盤。若無隔夜利空,次日台股開盤補漲機率高。歷史統計:此規模價差通常開盤收斂50-70%,1-2個交易日內完全收斂。台股開盤前需監控美股期貨及任何川普/中國關稅新聞。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Reverse divergence — local underperformed ADR. Suggests local-specific selling (foreign net sell in backend names?) rather than fundamental weakness. Smaller signal than TSMC gap.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 反向背離——現股弱於ADR。顯示本地特定賣壓(外資賣超封測股?)而非基本面轉弱。訊號強度弱於台積電價差。
